name: Solo RPG
greeting: Welcome. Tell me your name, or describe the kind of story you want, and we will begin. You can say something like, dark fantasy warrior named Kael, or just give me a name and I will build a world around you.
sttPrompt: Solo RPG terms: strong hit, weak hit, miss, momentum, chaos factor, clock, disposition, bond, edge, heart, iron, shadow, wits, face danger, compel, gather information, secure advantage, clash, strike, endure harm, endure stress, make connection, test bond, resupply, world shaping

toolSchemas.name: action_roll
toolSchemas.description: Core mechanic. Roll 2d6 + stat (capped at 10) vs 2d10 challenge dice. Also applies consequences (health/spirit/supply/momentum changes, clock advancement) based on move type, position, and result. Call for ANY risky action.

move.description: Which move the player is making

targetNpcId.description: Target NPC id for social moves

toolSchemas.name: burn_momentum
toolSchemas.description: Burn momentum to upgrade a roll result. Only valid when current momentum beats both challenge dice for the roll being upgraded. Resets momentum to +2.

c1.description: First challenge die from the roll

c2.description: Second challenge die from the roll

toolSchemas.name: check_state
toolSchemas.description: Returns the full current game state. This is AUTOMATICALLY forced as the first tool call every turn. Use these numbers as ground truth — never guess or remember stats from previous turns.

slot.description: Save slot name, defaults to autosave

toolSchemas.name: oracle
toolSchemas.description: Consult the oracle for narrative inspiration. Generates random prompts from thematic tables.

toolSchemas.name: save_game
toolSchemas.description: Save current game to persistent storage.

slot.description: Save slot name, defaults to autosave

toolSchemas.name: setup_character
toolSchemas.description: Set up the entire game in one call. Generates stats, initializes state, and marks the game as ready. After this returns, just narrate the opening scene. No need to call update_state — everything is already done.

genre.description: Chosen genre code or custom description

tone.description: Chosen tone code or custom description

archetype.description: Chosen archetype code or custom description

settingDescription.description: Two to three sentence setting description

locationDesc.description: One sentence description of starting location

openingSituation.description: One sentence dramatic hook for the opening scene

threatClockDesc.description: What happens when the threat clock fills

toolSchemas.name: update_state
toolSchemas.description: Lightweight state sync for during gameplay. Handles location changes, NPC additions, clock additions, time changes, and session log entries. Resource changes (health/spirit/supply/momentum) are auto-applied by action_roll — only use those fields here for manual adjustments like resting or trading. Pass only what changed.

logEntry.description: Short log entry for this scene
